description_long: This motorcycle features a sleek, modern design with a matte gray body and striking orange wheels. The frame is streamlined, with a low-profile seat and a compact fuel tank, giving it a sporty appearance. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, providing a comfortable grip for the rider. The wheels are thick and robust, suggesting stability and durability on urban roads. The motorcycle is positioned on a section of asphalt road with a visible yellow dividing line, enhancing its urban context. No visible branding or license plate is present, and the overall build suggests a custom or concept bike.
description: A modern motorcycle with a matte gray body and bold orange wheels, designed for urban environments. It has a streamlined frame and wide handlebars.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, orange wheels, matte gray body, and urban road surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the single wide orange front wheel and the handlebar width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile and wheel details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the wide orange rear wheel and the back of the seat.
